revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Module:Reply to/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Module:Reply to/doc]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[en:Module:Reply to/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Module:Reply to/doc]] [[Category:new pages]][[ja:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:untranslated pages]] </includeonly>

#redirect[[en:Module:Reply to/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Module:Reply to/doc]] [[Category:new pages]][[ja:{{{subst:PAGENAME}}}]][[Category:untranslated pages]] </includeonly>

#redirect[[en:Module:Reply to/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Module:Reply to/doc]] [[Category:new pages]][[ja:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:untranslated pages]] </includeonly>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove deleted category New automatic wikipedia redirects
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Module:Reply to/doc]] <noinclude></noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Module:Reply to/doc]] [[Category:new pages]][[ja:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:untranslated pages]] </includeonly>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "ew pages" to "ew automatic wikipedia redirects]][[Category:reimport"
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Module:Reply to/doc]] <noinclude></noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Module:Reply to/doc]] [[Category:new automatic wikipedia redirects]][[Category:reimport]][[ja:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:untranslated pages]] </includeonly>
